prodBuild.summary: App Hosting-style production build completed after replacing the Google button mark asset and adding guest logo navigation.

harnessGuardVerifyUtc.command: npm run harness:guard:precommit && node .agents/scripts/guard-diff.mjs --staged && TZ=UTC npm run verify:harness
harnessGuardVerifyUtc.summary: Staged Harness guards passed while unrelated AGENT.md remained dirty; lint, typecheck, full Vitest, and db:check passed under UTC: 197 tests passed, 7 local-Supabase-gated tests skipped.

targetedTests.summary: Auth/header UI suite passed: Google login uses the Google G asset button, and unauthenticated guest browsing users return to the login screen by clicking the FC moim logo.

designChangePolicy.summary: No broad redesign introduced; Google button was aligned to the standard white bordered Google sign-in style and guest logo navigation was added.

remoteRuntime.summary: Run after App Hosting deploys the UI polish commit.

localRuntime.summary: Google button rendered as a 280x40 white bordered sign-in button with google-g.svg, and team browse logo returned unauthenticated guests to the login screen without page errors.

googleProviderConfig.summary: Supabase Auth external provider settings report google true, kakao true, and email true.
